issues: circular shape has mild visual similarity to UI badge buttons at first glance
reasoning: The pickup_relic_v00 medallion is clearly distinguishable against the dark blue-gray panel background. Its warm gold outer ring combined with a bright cyan/teal pixel-art center creates strong luminance and hue contrast against the cool dark surroundings. Locatability is high — the asset pops immediately within 0.5s. The pixel art style is consistent with surrounding game elements (待通关 badges, 回遗迹前奏 banner), lending a native rather than pasted feel. No dark-area visibility issues as the asset sits on a mid-tone panel region. The only minor issue is that the circular medallion silhouette loosely echoes the shape of the UI badge buttons, which could cause a brief ~0.3s confusion; however the distinct gold+cyan coloring and central concentric-ring motif quickly differentiate it as a pickup collectible. Overall the asset fits the bright, uncluttered Echoes aesthetic cleanly.
